$comment_schema: Schema reference: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference. Examples: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official (plugins/* and external_plugins/*). Bridge MCP is a signed macOS .app — not an npm package — so the canonical 'command' field in .mcp.json points at the installed app's local MCP entry, not a fetched binary. See docs/operator/skills-attributions.md for the marketplace-submission gap notes.
name: notion-bridge
description: Notion Bridge — a signed macOS .app that exposes 150+ MCP tools over stdio + streamable-HTTP. Workspace ops (Notion, Messages, Mail, Calendar), local-machine ops (files, shell, screen, browser, AX), 13 bundled SKILL.md defaults from anthropics/skills.
notes: Bridge MCP is NOT an npm package or fetched binary — it is a signed Mac .app installed at /Applications/Notion Bridge.app.
The .mcp.json registers the app's local stdio + HTTP endpoints. Marketplace submission must handle this 'local-app server' shape explicitly; see docs/operator/skills-attributions.md.
